epwshiftr 0.1.4.9001
  • Articles
    • Manage CMIP6 CVs and Data Request
  • Manual
  • News

Store-Native EPW Morphing Workflow

Hongyuan Jia

Source: vignettes/articles/store-native-morphing-workflow.Rmd
store-native-morphing-workflow.Rmd
library(epwshiftr)

This article runs the full store-native EPW morphing workflow. It starts from ESGF File records, localises and extracts monthly CMIP6 variables into an EsgStore, then uses EpwMorpher to create future EPW files.

The example uses monthly Amon data so the live ESGF download is smaller than an equivalent daily workflow. Set EPWSHIFTR_VIGNETTE_OFFLINE=true before rendering to use the bundled deterministic fixtures.

Define the Site and Variables

The EPW file supplies the baseline hourly weather and the site metadata.

epw <- vignette_epw()

basename(epw)
#> [1] "SGP_Singapore.486980_IWEC.epw"

The morphing recipe uses the recommended CMIP variable set.

variables <- epw_morph_variables("recommended")
variables
#> [1] "tas"     "hurs"    "psl"     "rlds"    "rsds"    "sfcWind" "clt"

Query ESGF File Records

Start with Dataset records for one ScenarioMIP model, scenario, member, and monthly variable set. The example keeps the query on one data node to make the download plan predictable.

query <- esg_query("https://esgf-data.dkrz.de")$
    activity_id("ScenarioMIP")$
    experiment_id("ssp585")$
    source_id("EC-Earth3")$
    variant_label("r1i1p1f1")$
    frequency("mon")$
    variable_id(variables)$
    data_node("esgf.ceda.ac.uk")$
    params(table_id = "Amon")$
    fields(c(
        "source_id", "experiment_id", "variant_label", "frequency",
        "variable_id", "number_of_files", "number_of_aggregations", "access"
    ))$
    limit(50L)

query$state(null = FALSE)
#> $index_node
#> [1] "https://esgf-data.dkrz.de"
#> 
#> $parameter
#> $parameter$project
#> =CMIP6
#> 
#> $parameter$activity_id
#> =ScenarioMIP
#> 
#> $parameter$experiment_id
#> =ssp585
#> 
#> $parameter$source_id
#> =EC-Earth3
#> 
#> $parameter$variable_id
#> =tas,hurs,psl,rlds,rsds,sfcWind,clt
#> 
#> $parameter$frequency
#> =mon
#> 
#> $parameter$variant_label
#> =r1i1p1f1
#> 
#> $parameter$data_node
#> =esgf.ceda.ac.uk
#> 
#> $parameter$fields
#> =source_id,experiment_id,variant_label,frequency,variable_id,number_of_files,number_of_aggregations,access
#> 
#> $parameter$type
#> =Dataset
#> 
#> $parameter$offset
#> =0
#> 
#> $parameter$distrib
#> =true
#> 
#> $parameter$limit
#> =50
#> 
#> $parameter$format
#> =application%2Fsolr%2Bjson
#> 
#> $parameter$table_id
#> =Amon
if (use_live_query) {
    datasets <- query$collect(all = FALSE, limit = TRUE)
    datasets$save(vignette_cache_json("dataset-result.json"))
} else {
    datasets <- esg_result("dataset")$load(vignette_fixture_json("dataset-result.json"))
}
#> [1] "/tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/dataset-result.json"

datasets$to_data_table(fields = c(
    "id", "variable_id", "number_of_files", "access"
), formatted = TRUE)

Move from Dataset records to concrete File records, then keep files covering the 2060 morphing period.

if (use_live_query) {
    files <- datasets$collect(type = "File", fields = "*", all = TRUE, limit = 200L)
    files$save(vignette_cache_json("file-result.json"))
} else {
    files <- esg_result("file")$load(vignette_fixture_json("file-result.json"))
}
#> [1] "/tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/file-result.json"

files_2060 <- files$filter_time("2060-01-01", "2060-12-31", method = "drs")
#> Warning: Time filtering with method = 'drs' uses DRS filename conventions for
#> file records. Files whose time range cannot be parsed are kept.

files_2060$to_data_table(fields = c(
    "title", "variable_id", "checksum_type", "size", "url_download"
), formatted = TRUE)

Download and Extract into a Store

EsgStore keeps the File records, downloads, extraction plans, extracted Parquet outputs, morphing plans, and generated EPW files connected by IDs.

store_path <- file.path(future_weather_cache_dir, "store-native-morphing-store")
store <- EsgStore$new(store_path)

query_id <- store$add_files(files_2060, label = "singapore-ssp585-amon-2060")
store$query("SELECT filename, variable_id, local_path FROM file_catalog")
#>                                                      filename variable_id
#>                                                        <char>      <char>
#> 1:     clt_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc         clt
#> 2:     psl_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc         psl
#> 3:    rlds_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc        rlds
#> 4: sfcWind_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc     sfcWind
#> 5:     tas_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc         tas
#>    local_path
#>        <char>
#> 1:       <NA>
#> 2:       <NA>
#> 3:       <NA>
#> 4:       <NA>
#> 5:       <NA>

Download the cataloged File records through the store-bound downloader.

downloader <- store$downloader(n_workers = 0L, retries = 1L)

session_id <- store$download_files(
    downloader = downloader,
    replica = "current",
    run = TRUE,
    session_label = "store-native-morphing-2060",
    service = "HTTPServer",
    probe = FALSE,
    progress = FALSE
)

store$download_status(session_id = session_id, downloader = downloader)[
    , c("filename", "status", "target_path")
]
#>                                                      filename status
#>                                                        <char> <char>
#> 1:     tas_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc   done
#> 2:    rlds_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc   done
#> 3:     clt_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc   done
#> 4:     psl_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc   done
#> 5: sfcWind_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc   done
#>                                                                                                                                                 target_path
#>                                                                                                                                                      <char>
#> 1:     /tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/store-native-morphing-store/downloads/tas_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc
#> 2:    /tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/store-native-morphing-store/downloads/rlds_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc
#> 3:     /tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/store-native-morphing-store/downloads/clt_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc
#> 4:     /tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/store-native-morphing-store/downloads/psl_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc
#> 5: /tmp/RtmpVYZJ1M/epwshiftr-vignette-cache/future-weather/store-native-morphing-store/downloads/sfcWind_Amon_EC-Earth3_ssp585_r1i1p1f1_gr_206001-206012.nc

Plan and execute the site-scale extraction for the full 2060 period.

region <- store$plan_region(
    query_id = query_id,
    lon = 103.98,
    lat = 1.37,
    time = c("2060-01-01T00:00:00Z", "2060-12-31T23:59:59Z"),
    site_id = "SIN",
    variable_id = variables,
    nearest = 1L
)

region[, c("site_id", "variable_id", "status", "time_start", "time_stop")]
#>    site_id variable_id  status time_start           time_stop
#>     <char>      <char>  <char>     <POSc>              <POSc>
#> 1:     SIN         tas pending 2060-01-01 2060-12-31 23:59:59
#> 2:     SIN        rlds pending 2060-01-01 2060-12-31 23:59:59
#> 3:     SIN         clt pending 2060-01-01 2060-12-31 23:59:59
#> 4:     SIN         psl pending 2060-01-01 2060-12-31 23:59:59
#> 5:     SIN     sfcWind pending 2060-01-01 2060-12-31 23:59:59
processed <- store$extract(plan_id = region$plan_id, fallback = "auto")
processed[, c("variable_id", "status", "available_time_count")]
#>    variable_id status available_time_count
#>         <char> <char>                <int>
#> 1:         tas   done                   12
#> 2:        rlds   done                   12
#> 3:         clt   done                   12
#> 4:         psl   done                   12
#> 5:     sfcWind   done                   12
store$coverage(plan_id = region$plan_id)[, c(
    "variable_id", "complete", "status", "output_rows", "output_file_count"
)]
#>    variable_id complete status output_rows output_file_count
#>         <char>   <lgcl> <char>       <int>             <int>
#> 1:         tas     TRUE   done          12                 1
#> 2:         psl     TRUE   done          12                 1
#> 3:        rlds     TRUE   done          12                 1
#> 4:         clt     TRUE   done          12                 1
#> 5:     sfcWind     TRUE   done          12                 1

Morph the Baseline EPW

Create an EpwMorpher from the same store and baseline EPW. The morpher reads the extracted Parquet outputs and writes its own plans, factors, result Parquet, and EPW outputs back into the store.

morpher <- epw_morpher(
    store = store,
    epw = epw,
    site_id = "SIN",
    label = "singapore"
)
#> Superclass Idd has cloneable=FALSE, but subclass EpwIdd has cloneable=TRUE. A subclass cannot be cloneable when its superclass is not cloneable, so cloning will be disabled for EpwIdd.

morpher$required_variables()
#> [1] "tas"     "hurs"    "psl"     "rlds"    "rsds"    "sfcWind" "clt"

Summarise the extracted climate data by morphing period and month.

periods <- epw_morph_periods(`2060s` = 2060L)

climate <- morpher$summarise_climate(
    plan_id = region$plan_id,
    periods = periods,
    strict = TRUE
)

climate[, .N, by = .(variable_id, period)][order(variable_id)]
#>    variable_id period     N
#>         <char> <char> <int>
#> 1:         clt  2060s    36
#> 2:         psl  2060s    36
#> 3:        rlds  2060s    36
#> 4:     sfcWind  2060s    36
#> 5:         tas  2060s    36

Summarise the baseline EPW by month using the fields required by the recipe.

baseline <- morpher$summarise_baseline()
baseline[, .N, by = epw_field][order(epw_field)]
#>                                           epw_field     N
#>                                              <char> <int>
#> 1:                             atmospheric_pressure    12
#> 2:                             dry_bulb_temperature    12
#> 3:                      global_horizontal_radiation    12
#> 4: horizontal_infrared_radiation_intensity_from_sky    12
#> 5:                                relative_humidity    12
#> 6:                                  total_sky_cover    12
#> 7:                                       wind_speed    12

Create the morphing plan. This monthly example uses a relaxed plan so fields without a direct monthly morphing factor are carried through with diagnostics rather than blocking the tutorial render.

morph_plan <- morpher$plan(
    summary_id = unique(climate$summary_id),
    baseline_id = unique(baseline$baseline_id),
    strict = FALSE
)

diagnostics <- morpher$diagnose(morph_plan$morph_id)
diagnostic_fields <- intersect(c("severity", "epw_field", "variable_id", "message"), names(diagnostics))
diagnostics[, ..diagnostic_fields]
#>     severity                   epw_field variable_id
#>       <char>                      <char>      <char>
#>  1:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  2:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  3:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  4:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  5:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  6:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  7:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  8:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#>  9:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#> 10:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#> 11:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#> 12:  warning           relative_humidity        hurs
#> 13:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 14:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 15:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 16:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 17:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 18:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 19:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 20:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 21:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 22:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 23:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#> 24:  warning global_horizontal_radiation        rsds
#>     severity                   epw_field variable_id
#>       <char>                      <char>      <char>
#>                                                                         message
#>                                                                          <char>
#>  1:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  2:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  3:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  4:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  5:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  6:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  7:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  8:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#>  9:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#> 10:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#> 11:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#> 12:           Morphing factor is not available for relative_humidity from hurs.
#> 13: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 14: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 15: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 16: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 17: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 18: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 19: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 20: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 21: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 22: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 23: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#> 24: Morphing factor is not available for global_horizontal_radiation from rsds.
#>                                                                         message
#>                                                                          <char>
morpher$status(morph_plan$morph_id)[, c("morph_id", "status", "label", "strict")]
#>                                                            morph_id  status
#>                                                              <char>  <char>
#> 1: 717df8d9d50923541b6a5b1a22b883ba1f45a38cb6a6d425b85c75d14b3cea95 planned
#>        label strict
#>       <char> <lgcl>
#> 1: singapore  FALSE

Run the plan. This writes hourly morphed weather data as Parquet.

results <- morpher$run(morph_plan$morph_id, overwrite = TRUE)
results[, c("case_id", "row_count", "output_path")]
#>                                                             case_id row_count
#>                                                              <char>     <int>
#> 1: 92b4dfb3c6db383e4d85a7562ba9c4519fbdbb56e65632c8d65181d18488b99a      8760
#>                                                                                                                                                         output_path
#>                                                                                                                                                              <char>
#> 1: outputs/epw-morph/717df8d9d50923541b6a5b1a22b883ba1f45a38cb6a6d425b85c75d14b3cea95/case=92b4dfb3c6db383e4d85a7562ba9c4519fbdbb56e65632c8d65181d18488b99a.parquet

Write future EPW files from the morphing results.

outputs <- morpher$write_epw(
    morph_id = morph_plan$morph_id,
    dir = "outputs/future-epw",
    separate = FALSE,
    overwrite = TRUE
)
#> ── Info ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Data period #1 has been replaced with input data.
#> 
#>      Name StartDayOfWeek StartDay EndDay
#>  1:  Data         Monday     1/ 1  12/31
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

output_fields <- intersect(c("case_id", "path", "artifact_id", "created_at"), names(outputs))
outputs[, ..output_fields]
#>                                                             case_id
#>                                                              <char>
#> 1: 92b4dfb3c6db383e4d85a7562ba9c4519fbdbb56e65632c8d65181d18488b99a
#>                                                                                             path
#>                                                                                           <char>
#> 1: outputs/future-epw/9c1af2a3f543-SGP_Singapore.486980_IWEC.EC-Earth3.ssp585.r1i1p1f1.2060s.epw
#>                                                         artifact_id
#>                                                              <char>
#> 1: a8ea16112bdebfbc8e373ae528aaf40949ea19fbb2d87bffc597192a9b15d662
#>             created_at
#>                 <POSc>
#> 1: 2026-06-24 16:01:24

The store now records both the morphing result Parquet and the generated EPW files.

recorded_outputs <- morpher$outputs(morph_plan$morph_id)
recorded_fields <- intersect(c("case_id", "path", "artifact_id", "created_at"), names(recorded_outputs))
recorded_outputs[, ..recorded_fields]
#>                                                             case_id
#>                                                              <char>
#> 1: 92b4dfb3c6db383e4d85a7562ba9c4519fbdbb56e65632c8d65181d18488b99a
#>                                                                                             path
#>                                                                                           <char>
#> 1: outputs/future-epw/9c1af2a3f543-SGP_Singapore.486980_IWEC.EC-Earth3.ssp585.r1i1p1f1.2060s.epw
#>                                                         artifact_id
#>                                                              <char>
#> 1: a8ea16112bdebfbc8e373ae528aaf40949ea19fbb2d87bffc597192a9b15d662
#>             created_at
#>                 <POSc>
#> 1: 2026-06-24 16:01:24
store$close()

Developed by Hongyuan Jia, Adrian Chong.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
